tournaments.notes: Host: Stephen Brooks & Jamie Coller. Judges: Chris Fachman, John Earley, Roy Cruz, Joe Schaefer, Tyler Stevens, Marcus Parker. Promo: Redemption. Trivia: Brian Jones sets record with 2 perfect RNRS seasons and wins 4 overall RNRS titles.

fantasyDraft.note: No top cut in 2025. Scores calculated from official Nats results.

tournaments.notes: Host: Jay Chambers & Ron Sias. Judges: Chris Fachman, Gabe Isbell, John Earley, Roy Cruz, Joe Schaefer, Tyler Stevens, Marcus Parker, Rob Mulye, Jay Chambers, Josh Potratz. Promo: Guardian of your Souls. Trivia: 30th National Tournament.

fantasyDraft.note: Each top cut win = +3 pts. Scores calculated from official Nats results.

tournaments.notes: Host: Chris Fachman. Promo: Angel of God. Judges: Chris Fachman, Gabe Isbell, John Earley, Roy Cruz, Joe Schaefer, Tyler Stevens, Marcus Parker, Rob Mulye. Trivia: 4th time Chris has hosted in TN. First year a Husband & Wife combo wins Teams. Brian Jones won both sealed categories with perfect RNRS years. Israel's Deliverance starters debut. Israel's Rebellion set released.
Host: Gabe Isbell. Promo: Nicodemus, the Seeker/Nicodemus, the Teacher. Trivia: Gospel of Christ Phase 2 used for booster draft. Israel's Deliverance (K/L) debut for sealed.
Host: Roy Cruz. Promo: Humble Seeker. Trivia: 3-way tie for 3rd in T1 Multiplayer meant all 5 participants got RNRS points.
Host: Ginger DiMaggio & Josiah Beers. Promo: Mayhem. Trivia: Release of Lineage of Christ packs. Low numbers due to COVID.
Host: Chris Fachman. Promo: Son of God/New Jerusalem combo. Trivia: Prophecies of Christ latest set.
Host: Travis Brown, Roy Cruz, Terry Markoff. Promo: Whirlwind/Everlasting Ground. Trivia: Fall of Man latest set. First 2-player booster draft.
Host: Gabe Isbell. Promo: The Tabernacle. Trivia: Revelation of John released May 2017. Ron Sias attended his 20th consecutive Nationals.
Host: Travis Brown. Promo: Noah's Ark. Trivia: Cloud of Witnesses released May 2016.
Host: Chris Fachman. Promo: Glory of the Lord (Brown Border). Trivia: Debut of the Persecuted Church set in booster draft.
Host: Chris Bany, Pat Wester. Promo: Glory of the Lord (Gold Border). Trivia: The 20th Redemption National Tournament. Early Church Phase 1 packs debut.
Host: Roy Cruz, The Villanova family. Promo: none. Trivia: 4th Edition Starter Deck debuts. Experimental use of Top Cut for T1 2-Player.
Host: Chris Fachman. Trivia: 15th National tournament attended by Ron Sias.
Host: Chris Bany, Bill Voigt. Promo: Daniel. Trivia: Tins 20-25 of Faith of our Fathers and Rock of Ages debuted in Booster draft.
Host: John Michaliszyn. Trivia: Disciples set debuts. Teams becomes an official event.

tournaments.venue: Evangelical Free Church of the Conejo Valley
tournaments.notes: Host: Michael Wolfe and Bryon Hake. Trivia: Treasure of the Past set debuts (first ever Redemption foil cards). Custom Hero cards available.
Host: Stephen Schafer. Promo: Split Altar. Trivia: Rock of Ages Tins debuted and used for Booster Draft.
Host: Todd Gordon. Promo: Priests of Christ. Trivia: Faith of our Fathers Tins debuted and used for Booster Draft.
Host: Roy Cruz. Promo: Elijah. Trivia: Priests Booster Packs debuted.

Host: Chris Bany. Trivia: First 3-day Nationals. More than doubled the attendance record — 2005 attendance still the all-time record. First Type A category at Nationals. First Settlers of Canaan tournament. Local TV coverage.
Host: Chris Funkhouser. Trivia: Angel Wars Booster Packs debuted.
Host: Mike Berkenpas. Promo: Walking on Water. Trivia: Booster Draft replaces Sealed Deck Multiplayer for the first time.
Host: Chris Bany. Promo: Mary's Prophetic Act.
Host: Brian Sawyer. Promo: Authority of Christ. Trivia: First time Swiss style used at Nationals. First official Nationals Promo given to participants.
Host: Kory Lentine.
Host: Doug Gray.
Host: Rob Anderson.
Host: Rob Anderson.
Host: Rob Anderson. Trivia: Debut of Type 2 categories.
Host: Rob Anderson. Trivia: Only 2 categories at the first Nationals. This was the first ever official tournament. Redemption debuted at this convention.
Hosts: Brian Jones, Stephen Coates, Jayden Alstad, John Hendrix. Pre-register at redemptionccg.app/register
